about.careersSubtitle: Únase a un equipo excepcional para construir un mejor futuro energético
about.companyIntroText: AlwaysControl Technology fue fundada en 2018 y tiene su sede en el Parque Científico y Tecnológico, Distrito de Nanshan, Shenzhen. La empresa se enfoca en tecnologías de gestión inteligente y control en el sector de nuevas energías, dedicada a proporcionar soluciones de gestión energética eficientes, estables e inteligentes a clientes de todo el mundo. Tras años de crecimiento, AlwaysControl se ha convertido en un proveedor líder de soluciones del sector, con productos y servicios que cubren más de 50 países y regiones, compatible con más de 200 marcas de dispositivos, y más de 500 proyectos entregados.

privacy.content: AlwaysControl Technology (en adelante "nosotros") atribuye gran importancia a la protección de la privacidad de los usuarios. Esta Política de Privacidad explica cómo recopilamos, usamos, almacenamos y protegemos su información personal. Solo recopilamos su información personal en la medida necesaria, incluyendo pero no limitado a nombre, dirección de correo electrónico, número de teléfono y nombre de la empresa. Esta información se utiliza para responder a sus consultas, proporcionar soporte técnico y mejorar nuestros productos y servicios. Empleamos medidas de seguridad estándar de la industria para proteger su información. Sin su consentimiento, no compartiremos su información personal con terceros. Usted tiene derecho a acceder, corregir o eliminar su información personal en cualquier momento. Para consultas relacionadas con la privacidad, contáctenos en info@alwayscontrol.com.cn.
privacy.subtitle: Valoramos la protección de su privacidad
privacy.title: Política de Privacidad

products.accessMethodsSubtitle: Tú decides el método de acceso, sin relaciones de vinculación
products.cloudDirectDesc: Sin necesidad de puerta de enlace, acceso directo a través de la API en la nube de la marca, costo cero en hardware, despliegue rápido
products.ctaDesc: Contact our sales team for pricing and technical solutions

ess.description: ESS targets commercial and industrial energy storage, supporting peak-valley arbitrage, demand management, and backup power applications.
ess.positioning: Monitoreo de múltiples sitios de almacenamiento de energía para industria y comercio
ess.swFeature0Desc: One platform to manage all energy storage sites. Real-time view of SOC, power, and health status. 80% improvement in O&M efficiency with tiered alert notifications.
ess.swFeature1Desc: Automatically identifies optimal charge/discharge timing. Charge low, discharge high to maximize electricity price spread revenue. Strategy engine dynamically responds to real-time pricing.
ess.swFeature2Desc: Real-time power demand monitoring, intelligent peak shaving and valley filling, avoiding high demand charges without expensive transformer upgrades.
ess.swFeature2Point1: Automatic peak shaving and valley filling
ess.swFeature3Desc: Auto-generated daily/weekly/monthly reports. Excel/PDF export support. Complete energy consumption and revenue analysis for operational decision-making.
ess.swScenarioText: Unified monitoring and dispatch for multi-site energy storage assets across factories, commercial buildings, and parks. Enables cross-brand device integration, automatic peak-valley arbitrage, and demand management to reduce total electricity costs by 20-40%.
ess.title: ESS

evcms.description: EVCMS provides full lifecycle EV charging station management, supporting multi-charger coordination, dynamic load balancing, and OCPP protocol integration.
evcms.positioning: Equilibrio de carga para múltiples cargadores en estaciones de carga
evcms.swFeature0Desc: Millisecond-level real-time detection of main line total load, dynamic allocation of available power per charger. Supports more chargers running simultaneously without upgrading the main line, completely eliminating circuit breaker trips.
evcms.swFeature0Point1: Zero-upgrade support for multi-charger simultaneous charging
evcms.swFeature1Desc: Supports OCPP 1.6J / 2.0.1, compatible with major charger brands on the market. No need to replace existing hardware for quick unified management.
evcms.swFeature1Point2: No need to replace existing equipment
evcms.swFeature2Desc: Supports time-based, kWh-based, and membership discount billing strategies. One-click settlement with VIP priority mode and queue mode.
evcms.swFeature3Desc: Real-time visualization of charging records, fault alerts, and power curves. All-in-one operational data dashboard to maximize site profitability.
evcms.swScenarioText: Dynamic load balancing and operational management for multi-charger EV charging stations in parking lots, office buildings, and parks. Enables coordinated multi-charger charging and smart billing without upgrading the main power line.
evcms.title: EVCMS

products.gatewayLanDesc: Despliegue in situ de la puerta de enlace Neuron, los datos no suben a la nube, control local en tiempo real, ideal para escenarios industriales

hems.description: HEMS provides intelligent energy scheduling for residential energy storage, optimizing PV-storage-charging integration to maximize green energy self-consumption and reduce electricity bills.
hems.positioning: Gestión unificada de energía solar, almacenamiento y carga para el hogar
hems.swFeature0Desc: Dual architecture for cyber attack defense and data privacy protection, ensuring a trusted operating environment and asset security closed-loop for energy management systems.
hems.swFeature1Desc: Full coverage from component-level to site-level to batch diagnostics. Precise O&M recommendations simplify maintenance work and improve efficiency.
hems.swFeature2Desc: Advanced algorithms for intelligent dispatch, multiple energy modes to choose from, and effortless green energy management on your phone.
hems.swScenarioText: Supports data collection, station monitoring, and full O&M management for photovoltaic, energy storage, and other renewable energy stations. Through a cloud-based big data analytics platform, it enables transparent management, automated operations, intelligent diagnostics, and decision support for all renewable energy stations under management.
hems.title: HEMS

hwDesc.neuron-iii: EV charging station controller (built-in meter + DLB)

products.hwGatewaySubtitle: Works with the following hardware gateways for local device access and offline operation
products.hwNeuronIIIDesc: EV charging station controller (built-in meter + DLB)

neuron-ii.description: Neuron II is a universal multi-protocol smart gateway supporting 4G, WiFi, RS485, CAN and other interfaces, widely applicable to energy storage, PV, power quality and more. Works offline without cloud dependency.
neuron-ii.spec_protocols: Modbus RTU/TCP, OCPP 1.6J, MQTT, HTTP REST
neuron-ii.title: Neuron II

neuron-iii-lite.description: Neuron III Lite is a lightweight anti-trip controller for small charging scenarios, paired with ATP III to provide basic DLB preventing circuit breaker trips.
neuron-iii-lite.title: Neuron III Lite

neuron-iii.description: Neuron III is a smart controller designed for EV charging stations, featuring built-in high-accuracy meter and millisecond DLB (Dynamic Load Balancing) for multi-charger coordination and anti-trip protection.
neuron-iii.positioning: Controlador especializado para estaciones de carga
neuron-iii.tagline: EV Charging Controller with Built-in Meter + DLB
neuron-iii.title: Neuron III

pqms.description: PQMS monitors power grid quality in real time, providing harmonic analysis, voltage fluctuation alerts, and electricity auditing.
pqms.positioning: Monitoreo remoto de la calidad de la energía
pqms.swFeature0Desc: Real-time acquisition of voltage, current, power factor, and harmonics up to the 50th order. Precisely captures each harmonic component to quickly locate problem equipment and pollution sources.
pqms.swFeature1Desc: Map-based display of site health status. At-a-glance overview of network-wide power quality distribution. Unified analysis center for multi-monitoring-point data.
pqms.swFeature2Desc: Online adjustment of SVG/APF compensation parameters, reducing on-site inspection frequency by over 90%. Supports remote OTA firmware upgrades for field devices.
pqms.swFeature3Desc: One-click export of daily/weekly/monthly reports meeting grid company compliance inspection requirements. Historical analysis reports help identify root causes of power quality degradation.
pqms.swScenarioText: Remote monitoring and treatment of power quality in industrial parks, data centers, hospitals, and other facilities. Enables harmonic analysis, online compensation parameter optimization, and automatic compliance report generation.
pqms.title: PQMS

products.recommendHwSubtitle: Works with the following hardware gateways for local device access and offline operation
products.subtitle: Hardware y software de alto rendimiento para la gestión de nuevas energías

ess.desc: 一个平台管理所有储能站点，实时查看各站 SOC、功率、健康状态，运维效率提升 80%，告警分级推送。
ess.label: 多站点统一监控

ess.desc: 自动识别最优充放电时机，低充高放，最大化电价差收益，策略引擎动态响应实时电价波动。
ess.label: 智能峰谷套利
points: 最优充放策略自动执行

ess.desc: 实时监控功率需量，智能削峰填谷，避免高额需量费超限，无需高额变压器扩容费。
ess.label: 需量管理

ess.desc: 日报/周报/月报自动生成，支持导出 Excel/PDF，完整的能源消耗与收益分析，辅助运营决策。
ess.label: 能效报告

evcms.desc: 毫秒级实时检测主线总负载，动态分配各桩可用功率，在不扩容主线的前提下支持更多充电桩同时运行，彻底杜绝跳闸。
evcms.label: DLB 动态负载均衡

evcms.desc: 支持 OCPP 1.6J / 2.0.1，兼容市场主流充电桩品牌，无需替换现有硬件，快速接入统一管理。
evcms.label: OCPP 协议兼容

evcms.desc: 支持按时计费、按电量计费、会员优惠等多种计费策略，一键结算，支持 VIP 优先模式与排队模式。
evcms.label: 智能计费系统
points: 多维计费策略灵活配置
VIP 优先 + 排队模式

evcms.desc: 充电记录、故障告警、功率曲线实时可视化，全站运营数据一站式掌握，助力站点效益最大化。
evcms.label: 运营数据分析

hems.desc: 基于网络攻击防御与数据隐私保护双重架构，实现能源管理系统的可信运行环境与资产安全闭环。
hems.label: 安全稳定
points: 金融级安全防护与权限管控
灾备恢复 + 加密双备份

hems.desc: 组件级—站级—批量诊断全覆盖，运维意见精准指导，简化运维工作，提升运维效率。
hems.label: 省心运维
points: 实时故障告警 & 自动诊断
全周期可追溯运维保障

hems.desc: 先进算法智能调度，多种能源模式随心选择，绿电管理掌上轻松实现。
hems.label: 智能体验
points: AI 能源管理，智能高效
自定义仪表盘，随心掌控

pqms.desc: 实时采集电压、电流、功率因数、谐波至第50次，精准捕捉各次谐波分量，快速定位问题设备与污染源。
pqms.label: 50次谐波全面监测

pqms.desc: 站点健康状态地图化展示，一眼掌握全网电能质量分布，多监测点数据统一分析中心。
pqms.label: 多站点地图可视化

pqms.desc: 在线调整 SVG/APF 补偿参数，减少 90% 以上现场巡检频次，支持远程 OTA 升级现场设备固件。
pqms.label: 远程参数调优
points: 远程 OTA 固件升级

pqms.desc: 日报/周报/月报一键导出，满足电网公司合规检查要求，历史分析报告帮助定位电能质量劣化根因。
pqms.label: 合规报告自动生成
points: 满足电网公司检查要求

vpp.desc: 统一调度分布式储能、光伏、充电桩，聚合规模不受限，支持异构品牌混合部署，已打通主流储能品牌云端 API。
vpp.label: 万级设备聚合
points: 主流云端 API 已打通

vpp.desc: 调度响应速度达电网辅助服务最高要求，支持秒级批量指令下发，实时状态订阅：SOC、功率、告警状态毫秒级推送。
vpp.label: 500ms 指令下发

vpp.desc: VPP 运营商无需自研接入层，旭衡统一调度接口支持充放电指令、SOC 查询、告警订阅，完整调度记录与审计。
vpp.label: 多品牌 API 适配
points: 充放电 + 告警订阅全覆盖

vpp.desc: 支持对接上游电网信号或自定义调度策略，满足不同电力市场交易模式，灵活适配各地监管要求。
vpp.label: 自定义调度策略

swScenarios.ess: Unified monitoring and dispatch for multi-site energy storage assets across factories, commercial buildings, and parks. Enables cross-brand device integration, automatic peak-valley arbitrage, and demand management to reduce electricity costs by 20-40%.
swScenarios.evcms: Dynamic load balancing and operational management for multi-charger EV charging stations. Enables coordinated multi-charger charging and smart billing without upgrading the main power line.
swScenarios.hems: Supports data collection, station monitoring, and full O&M management for photovoltaic, energy storage, and other renewable energy stations. Through a cloud-based big data analytics platform, it enables transparent management, automated operations, intelligent diagnostics, and decision support for all renewable energy stations.
swScenarios.pqms: Remote monitoring and treatment of power quality in industrial parks, data centers, and hospitals. Enables harmonic analysis, online compensation parameter optimization, and automatic compliance report generation.
swScenarios.vpp: For VPP operators to aggregate multi-brand distributed energy storage devices, enabling batch dispatch and real-time status monitoring via cloud API to participate in grid ancillary service markets.

products.title: Productos

vpp.description: VPP aggregates distributed energy storage, PV, and EV chargers to participate in grid peak shaving and frequency regulation, unlocking additional revenue.
vpp.positioning: Plataforma de despacho para centrales eléctricas virtuales
vpp.swFeature0Desc: Unified dispatch of distributed storage, PV, and EV chargers. Unlimited aggregation scale with heterogeneous brand mixed deployment. Major storage brand cloud APIs already integrated.
vpp.swFeature1Desc: Dispatch response speed meets the highest requirements of grid ancillary services. Supports second-level batch command dispatch with real-time status subscription: SOC, power, and alert status with millisecond-level push.
vpp.swFeature2Desc: VPP operators don't need to develop their own integration layer. AlwaysControl's unified dispatch interface supports charge/discharge commands, SOC queries, and alert subscriptions with complete dispatch records and auditing.
vpp.swFeature2Point1: Full coverage of charge/discharge + alert subscription
vpp.swFeature2Point2: Complete dispatch records and audit trail
vpp.swFeature3Desc: Supports connection to upstream grid signals or custom dispatch strategies to meet different electricity market trading models, flexibly adapting to regional regulatory requirements.
vpp.swScenarioText: For VPP operators to aggregate multi-brand distributed energy storage devices, enabling batch dispatch and real-time status monitoring via cloud API to participate in grid ancillary service markets.
vpp.title: VPP

ess.background: Fábricas, edificios comerciales y parques industriales enfrentan una gran diferencia en tarifas eléctricas entre horas pico y valle, con altos costos de energía. Los sistemas de almacenamiento de energía son un medio clave para reducir costos, pero la gestión de múltiples sitios distribuidos es compleja y la integración de equipos de diferentes marcas es difícil.
ess.case0Problem: Cloud platform built in 5 days, cross-brand device integration in 10 days
ess.case1Problem: Peak-valley arbitrage annual revenue ¥800K, 80% O&M efficiency improvement
ess.description: Help factories, malls and offices reduce total electricity costs by 20–40% through demand management and peak-valley arbitrage.
ess.feature1: Demand control: Real-time power monitoring to prevent overages
ess.feature2: Arbitrage engine: Identify optimal charge/discharge timing automatically
ess.feature3: Multi-brand: Manage all storage brands from one platform
ess.feature4: Gestión unificada de múltiples sitios: Monitoreo centralizado de múltiples sitios de almacenamiento de energía, aumentando la eficiencia operativa en un 80%, con notificaciones de alertas escalonadas.
ess.pain1: High demand charges: Peak usage spikes demand fees
ess.pain2: Missed arbitrage: Unable to exploit peak-valley price spreads
ess.pain3: Mixed fleet: Multiple storage brands with no unified management
ess.title: Commercial & Industrial Storage

evcms.background: Estacionamientos, oficinas y parques empresariales necesitan desplegar múltiples cargadores, pero la capacidad de la línea principal es limitada; la carga rápida simultánea de varios cargadores puede fácilmente disparar el interruptor principal; las marcas de cargadores son variadas, los protocolos difieren y la gestión unificada es difícil.
evcms.case0Problem: DLB deployment reduced tripping to 0, charging throughput up 60%
evcms.case0Scale: 40 chargers, original main line 150kW, no upgrade
evcms.case1Problem: Unified management platform launched, O&M labor costs reduced 55%
evcms.description: Complete solution for charging station operators: multi-charger coordination, dynamic load balancing (DLB), billing management — maximize throughput while protecting grid safety.
evcms.feature2: OCPP protocol: Compatible with major charger brands
evcms.feature3: Smart billing: Flexible pricing strategies and membership management
evcms.feature4: Monitoreo en tiempo real y datos operativos: Gestión visual integral de registros de carga, alertas de fallos y curvas de potencia.
evcms.pain1: Trip risk: Multiple simultaneous charges overload transformers
evcms.pain2: Complex ops: Multiple charger brands hard to manage
evcms.pain3: Low revenue: Inefficient power allocation hurts operations
evcms.title: EV Charging Station

hems.background: Los usuarios domésticos ya tienen instalados sistemas fotovoltaicos + de almacenamiento de energía, pero las marcas de los dispositivos son diferentes y los protocolos varían, careciendo de un punto de entrada unificado para monitoreo y gestión; las políticas de tarifas eléctricas por horas pico y valle son complejas, y la gestión manual no puede maximizar los ahorros en electricidad.
hems.case0Problem: 35% electricity cost savings after unified integration, self-consumption rate increased to 72%
hems.case0Scale: Multi-household PV + storage systems, various brands
hems.case1Problem: Automatic energy strategy switching, saving ~180 AUD/month
hems.case1Scale: 3.5kW PV + 5kWh storage with local peak-valley pricing
hems.description: Integrated energy management for residential PV, battery storage, and EV charging — maximizing green energy self-consumption and reducing electricity costs.
hems.feature1: Peak-valley arbitrage: Auto charge at low rates, discharge at peak
hems.feature2: Smart scheduling: Optimize based on weather and usage patterns
hems.feature3: Backup power: Seamless off-grid switching, zero interruption
hems.feature4: Conexión directa a la nube: Sin necesidad de hardware de puerta de enlace adicional, los dispositivos se conectan directamente a través de API en la nube, permitiendo un despliegue rápido y de bajo costo.
hems.pain1: High bills: Peak-hour electricity costs are significant
hems.pain2: Instability: Power outages affect quality of life
hems.pain3: No coordination: Devices cannot work together intelligently
hems.title: Residential Energy Storage

pqms.background: Los parques industriales, centros de datos, hospitales y complejos comerciales tienen requisitos estrictos de calidad de energía. Problemas como contaminación armónica, caídas de voltaje y desequilibrio trifásico afectan directamente la vida útil del equipo y la seguridad de producción, pero los modos tradicionales de inspección manual son lentos y no cubren todas las áreas.
pqms.case0Problem: Precise harmonic source location, 78% reduction in equipment failure rate
pqms.case1Problem: 24/7 real-time monitoring, 3 potential failures pre-warned, 90% reduction in on-site inspections
pqms.case1Scale: Critical load voltage fluctuation, delayed manual inspection
pqms.description: Comprehensive power quality monitoring and mitigation — detect harmonics, voltage imbalance, and power factor issues in real time to protect sensitive equipment.
pqms.feature1: 24/7 monitoring: Continuous power quality data collection
pqms.feature2: Harmonic analysis: Identify harmonic sources with remediation guidance
pqms.feature3: Alerting: Real-time anomaly push notifications, proactive prevention
pqms.feature4: Notificaciones de alerta multinivel: Notificaciones en tiempo real por WeChat corporativo, correo electrónico y SMS, con advertencias anticipadas para prevenir anomalías.
pqms.pain1: Equipment damage: Harmonic pollution causes frequent failures
pqms.pain2: High consumption: Low power factor increases reactive losses
pqms.pain3: Hard to trace: Power quality issues are difficult to diagnose
pqms.tagline: Monitoreo remoto de calidad de energía
pqms.title: Power Quality Management

solutions.relatedProductsDesc: Productos involucrados en esta solución, haz clic para más detalles
solutions.subtitle: Soluciones profesionales de gestión inteligente de energía para diversas industrias
solutions.title: Soluciones

vpp.background: Los activos energéticos dispersos no pueden participar individualmente en el despacho de la red. La VPP agrega una gran cantidad de baterías distribuidas, coordinándolas como una "central eléctrica virtual" que descarga colectivamente en horas pico y almacena energía en horas valle, participando en el mercado eléctrico spot y mecanismos de respuesta a la demanda para obtener beneficios.
vpp.case0Problem: Dispatch commands delivered within 500ms, significantly improved asset utilization
vpp.case0Scale: Aggregated multi-brand residential storage for FCAS demand response
vpp.description: Aggregate distributed storage, PV and EV chargers into a virtual power plant to participate in grid ancillary services and generate additional revenue.
vpp.feature1: Resource aggregation: Unified dispatch of distributed energy
vpp.feature2: Market access: Connect to major power spot markets and ancillary services
vpp.feature3: Revenue analytics: Real-time arbitrage calculation with transparent settlement
vpp.feature4: Acceso a múltiples mercados eléctricos: Compatibilidad con diversos modos de transacción, como el mercado spot y servicios auxiliares de ajuste de carga y frecuencia.
vpp.pain1: Idle assets: Storage assets are underutilized
vpp.pain2: Policy complexity: How to enter electricity markets is unclear
vpp.pain3: High barrier: VPP technical integration is complex
vpp.title: Virtual Power Plant
